name: ClickSend Messaging API
what_it_does: Omnichannel messaging platform REST API supporting SMS, MMS, email, fax, voice, and even direct mail (print + post) from a single API. Strong in Australia and APAC markets.
use_cases: Sending transactional SMS notifications for order confirmations and shipping updates
Omnichannel customer communication via SMS, email, and voice from one API
Physical direct mail campaigns via API for high-value customer segments
Emergency alert broadcasting across SMS and voice simultaneously
Fax delivery for healthcare, legal, and financial compliance use cases
not_for: High-volume WhatsApp messaging (ClickSend is primarily SMS/email/fax focused)
Organizations needing advanced analytics and campaign management
best_when: An agent needs multi-channel messaging including physical mail and fax alongside digital channels, particularly in Australia/APAC markets.
avoid_when: You need WhatsApp Business API or advanced conversational AI — use Gupshup or Infobip.

auth.notes: HTTP Basic Auth with username (email) and API key as password. API key from ClickSend dashboard. Simple auth model without scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: $5 free credit on signup for testing
pricing.paid_tiers: SMS from $0.02-0.08/message AUD; email from $0.001/email; direct mail from $1.50/piece
pricing.notes: Pay-as-you-go pricing. No monthly minimums. Volume discounts available. Pricing in AUD with competitive global rates. Direct mail pricing varies by destination country.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAPI spec and Swagger UI available. Multiple SDK languages with auto-generated documentation. Error responses include HTTP status codes and descriptive messages. Delivery receipt webhooks for status tracking.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sending is not idempotent — retries can result in duplicate messages. Use delivery receipts to confirm status before retrying.
known_agent_gotchas: Direct mail has physical delivery time (3-10 days) — not real-time like digital channels
Fax delivery can take minutes — asynchronous status tracking required
Country-specific regulations apply — Australian Spam Act compliance needed for AU
Basic Auth with password-as-API-key is non-standard — some HTTP clients need explicit handling

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Basic Auth is HTTPS-only. No scope granularity. Australian data handling standards. GDPR compliant for European customers. No MFA for API access.
